extract: Aegislash (Japanese: ギルガルド Gillgard) is a dual-type Steel/Ghost Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Doublade when exposed to a Dusk Stone. It is the final form of Honedge. Aegislash has the ability to change forms during battle, depending on the moves it uses. It changes from its Shield Forme into its Blade Forme when using a damaging move, changing back when using King's Shield or when switched out. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.)
